added.summary: Changes getSubset() return type from SkIRect to SkRect. Intentional API type system evolution in upstream m122.
Adds SKOTTIE_TRIVIAL_FONTRUN_ITER conditional for Chrome Linux/CrOS crash workaround (crbug.com/1520148). Known upstream fix.
Adds SkSafeMath overflow checks for totalRectCount calculations. Security hardening for large input values.
Adds SkSafeMath overflow checks when combining quad counts. Returns kCannotCombine on overflow. Defensive programming.
Adds overflow check in PatternHelper::init() for vertexCount calculation. Prevents integer overflow with negative or large repeatCount.
Adds SkSafeMath overflow checks for numRects accumulation. Consistent with safety patterns in other GPU ops.
Adds SkSafeMath overflow checks for numRects in region complexity loop. Follows established safety pattern across GPU ops.
Changes allocateSlotData() to return std::optional for overflow detection. Adds SkSafeMath and SkTFitsIn checks.
Updates allocateSlotData() signature to return std::optional. Header change matching implementation for overflow handling.
Adds fAllowSkSL=false to SkDrawable::Deserialize() procs. Security hardening preventing SkSL code injection during deserialization.

removed.summary: Build system patches for iOS/tvOS SDK, WinRT, visibility flags, and PIC mode. Upstream modernized build config, patches no longer needed.
Toolchain patches for Tizen, MSVC vcvarsall, and Linux soname. Upstream adopted improvements, patches correctly dropped.
WGL conditional compilation removed from WinRT targets. Upstream adopted platform incompatibility fix.
MakeDefault() compatibility shim no longer needed. m122 removed SkFontMgr::Factory; fork uses platform-specific singleton instead.
RefDefault() declaration patch dropped. m120 removed typeface factories; C API stubs return nullptr per PR description.
RefDefault() implementation dropped. Typeface factory approach replaced by font manager singleton in m122.
GLX dynamic loading patch dropped. Upstream adopted dlopen/dlsym approach, patch no longer needed.
Metal retain() fix dropped. m120/m122 moved to GrDirectContexts namespace, old patch no longer applies.
Tizen maxId increase (16 to 256) dropped. Upstream likely adopted or code was refactored in m122.
ARM64 WGL enablement patch dropped. Upstream removed the ARM64 exclusion in later milestones.
Minor formatting and Emscripten SDK tweaks dropped. Maintenance changes absorbed by upstream.

changed.summary: Go module dependency file updated for m122 upstream sync. Mechanically generated, reflects new dependency versions.
Go version updated 1.18 to 1.21 with dependency version bumps. Legitimate upstream m122 modernization.
Go checksums updated to match new go.mod versions. Mechanically generated from dependency changes.
Expat commit hash updated (441f98d to 624da0f). Identical in both old and new patches. Clean dependency pin.
GPU linking changes (Linux GL to dl, Windows OpenGL32 removed + WinRT guard), SkiaSharp+HarfBuzz custom target maintained.
Dependency pins updated with some entries commented out and others restored. Matches PR description of custom pin restoration.
SkiaSharp platform extensions maintained: static build, soname, SDK detection, multi-platform variables. Fork-specific build config.
C API binding sources (sk_*.h/.cpp) and gr_context support maintained in skia_core_sources. Required SkiaSharp C API layer.
breakText() method overloads maintained. Content identical between patches, only line offsets differ from upstream changes.
breakText() implementation maintained. Functionally identical 91-line method, only line numbers differ due to upstream shifts.
allocRunRSXform() signature updated: added const SkRect* bounds parameter. API change matching upstream m122 text blob handling.
WinRT and nanoserver platform guards added for thumbnail generation and typeface subsetting. Valid platform abstraction.
Tizen platform support added: conditional cflags for system freetype2 include path. Legitimate platform-specific build addition.
